title: Architect’s Haven
description: Transform every block into a masterpiece! Build, decorate, and sculpt your world with ultimate precision, stunning detail, and smooth performance.
body: Architect’s Haven is the ultimate modpack for creative builders and decorators. Shape your world with precision using chisels, bits, and detailed decorative blocks. Add immersive terrain, realistic weathering, and architectural touches like roofs, windows, doors, and furniture. Plan and perfect your builds effortlessly with Litematica, WorldEdit, MiniHUD, and REI. Optimized with Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and FerriteCore, this pack keeps your world smooth and responsive, letting your creativity shine without limits.
